name: io.github.JosueM1109/personal-finance-mcp
description: Self-hosted, read-only MCP server that connects your banks and investments via Plaid.

environmentVariables.name: PLAID_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Your Plaid client_id from the Plaid dashboard (Team Settings -> API).

environmentVariables.name: PLAID_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: Your Plaid secret for the target environment (production or sandbox).

environmentVariables.name: PORT
environmentVariables.description: Port the MCP HTTP server listens on inside the container.
